subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the Most Firm Handle! The entire Concourse on High gazeth down from the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بعروه وثقی جمیع ملأ اعلا از ملکوت ابهى نگرانند
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @the concourse on high, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
